author: Domekologe
name: DashboardTemplate
short: Template cog for the DKS web dashboard integration.
description: Annotated reference for wiring a cog into the DKS web dashboard: widget, guild panel (all field types) and global panel (owner). Does nothing productive on its own.
install_msg: Also load `webdashboard`. Check with `[p]dashboardtemplate`. Migration guide: README.md in the cog folder.
end_user_data_statement: This template cog only stores example settings (per server and global). No personal data is stored.
